discovery.text: Heritage 1908 building with a modern boutique renovation. Home to Uva Wine & Cocktail Bar and Cibo Trattoria (both excellent). Great Granville Street location near theatres. Rooms are compact but stylish. Budget-friendly at ~$140-180 CAD. Rating 3.8/5 — lower rating reflects smaller rooms, but the restaurant/bar scene is top-tier. The 'stay for the scene' pick.
